member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.DocumentAttachmentCopyRunner
member.summary: Copies (links) Work Order document attachments from Field Service into FSCM. This is a best-effort step and must not break posting in case of attachment issues.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.InvoiceAttributesUpdateRunner
member.summary:
Orchestration-level runner that reads InvoiceAttributes from the posting payload and calls the FSCM UpdateInvoiceAttributes endpoint.
: - This must be called explicitly by orchestrators/endpoints. - Posting (journal validate/create/post) must NOT call invoice update implicitly.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.InvoiceAttributeSyncRunner
member.summary:
Builds invoice attribute delta (FS -> FSCM) using Work Order header fields and FSCM snapshots, and injects the computed InvoiceAttributes into the posting payload.
: - This component MUST NOT call FSCM "update" endpoints directly. - Posting pipeline (FscmJournalPoster) is the single place that performs the actual update, and it must happen AFTER successful journal posting (hard dependent).
Rules: - FS is system-of-record: FS overrides FSCM. - If FS value is null but FSCM has value, AIS clears FSCM (sets null). - Outbound payload uses FSCM attribute names (via Fs->Fscm mapping) OR fixed FSCM names for derived comparisons.
Mapping source of truth (for standard fields): - FSCM AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes (Name, FSA)
Option B behavior: - For each (Company, SubProjectId), FSCM definitions + current values are fetched ONCE and cached in-memory for the run. - Comparisons/delta are performed against the in-memory snapshot.

Builds invoice attribute delta (FS -> FSCM) using Work Order header fields and FSCM snapshots, and injects the computed InvoiceAttributes into the posting payload.
: - This component MUST NOT call FSCM "update" endpoints directly. - Posting pipeline (FscmJournalPoster) is the single place that performs the actual update, and it must happen AFTER successful journal posting (hard dependent).
Rules: - FS is system-of-record: FS overrides FSCM. - If FS value is null but FSCM has value, AIS clears FSCM (sets null). - Outbound payload uses FSCM attribute names (via Fs->Fscm mapping) OR fixed FSCM names for derived comparisons.
Mapping source of truth (for standard fields): - FSCM AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes (Name, FSA)
Option B behavior: - For each (Company, SubProjectId), FSCM definitions + current values are fetched ONCE and cached in-memory for the run. - Comparisons/delta are performed against the in-memory snapshot.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.InvoiceAttributeSyncRunner.EnrichPostingPayloadAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Enriches the given posting payload JSON by injecting computed InvoiceAttributes onto each WO element (only for WOs that have a delta vs FSCM snapshot).
Orchestrators/endpoints must call FSCM update endpoint AFTER successful journal post using InvoiceAttributesUpdateRunner.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.IFscmProjectLifecycle
member.summary: Abstractions used by Functions-layer Durable Activities for job operations. Implementations are registered in DI. Some lifecycle steps may still be NOOP until FSCM endpoints are finalized.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.ICustomerChangeOrchestrator.ExecuteAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the full Customer Change business process and returns the new SubProjectId.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.NoopFscmProjectLifecycle
member.summary: Safe placeholder implementation: logs intent, does not call external systems.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.ActivitiesUseCase
member.summary: Implements activity business logic (Activities.cs becomes an orchestration adapter only).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.CustomerChangeOrchestrator.BuildMinimalInvoicePayloadJson(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Minimal payload builder used when we have no delta payload and/or FullFetch is empty. This payload is shaped like the posting envelope and is sufficient for the invoice sync/update pipeline.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Services.Summaries.WorkOrderProcessingSummaryBuilder.ValidationFailureRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
WO validation failed\\.\\s*WorkOrderGUID=(?<guid>[^,]+),\\s*WO Number=(?<wo>[^.]+)\\.\\s*Info=(?<info>.*?)(?:\\s+Errors:\\s*(?<errs>.*))?$
Options:
RegexOptions.Singleline | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match the string "WO validation failed.".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "WorkOrderGUID=".
○ "guid" capture group.
○ Match a character other than ',' atomically at least once.
○ Match ','.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "WO Number=".
○ "wo" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '.' atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "Info=".
○ "info" capture group.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "Errors:".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ "errs" capture group.
○ Match any character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.Activities
member.summary: Durable activity adapter only. All business logic lives in .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.DeltaActivities
member.summary: Durable activity that converts an FS (Dataverse) payload into a delta-only payload by comparing against FSCM journal history.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.DeltaActivities.Sha256Hex(System.String)
member.summary: Executes sha 256 hex.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.FsaDeltaActivities
member.summary: Provides fsa delta activities behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsActivities
member.summary: Durable Activities for job operations.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsV2Activities
member.summary: Additive V2 job operation activities. These activities are invoked only by the V2 job operation orchestrators/endpoints. Existing functionality remains unchanged.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsV2ParsingActivities
member.summary: Small, deterministic parsing activities for V2 job operation orchestrations. Kept separate to avoid non-deterministic JSON parsing in orchestrator code.

member.summary: Provides accrual orchestrator functions behavior.

member.summary: Provides durable accrual orchestration behavior.

member.summary: Executes success.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.DurableAccrualOrchestration.IsAdHocAllTrigger(System.String)
member.summary: Retries posting for retryable-only groups returned by validation/posting. Retries are executed per journal type and only for the retryable subset payload.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsOrchestration
member.summary: Durable orchestrations for job operations (Post / Customer Change). These orchestrations intentionally reuse the existing "Fetch from FSA -> optional delta -> validate/post" pipeline, then execute operation-specific FSCM project lifecycle steps.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.IJobOperationsHttpUseCase
member.summary: Function-layer use case for job operation HTTP endpoints. Keeps Function adapters thin and enables substitutable implementations.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon
member.summary: Backward-compatible facade for the previous shared job operations handler. The SOLID refactor moves endpoint logic into endpoint-specific use cases.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.AdHocBatchAllJobsFunction
member.summary: Thin HTTP adapter for AdHocBatch_AllJobs. Delegates to JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.AdHocBatchSingleJobFunction
member.summary: Thin HTTP adapter for AdHocBatch_SingleJob. Delegates to JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.CancelJobFunction
member.summary: Thin HTTP adapter for CancelJob. Delegates to JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.CustomerChangeFunction
member.summary: Thin HTTP adapter for CustomerChange. Delegates to JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.PostJobFunction
member.summary: Thin HTTP adapter for PostJob. Delegates to JobOperationsHttpHandlerCommon.

member.summary: Provides sub project function behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.AdHocAllAcceptedResponse
member.summary: Submit acknowledgement contract for AdHoc batch-all requests. Keeps the HTTP layer explicit while the bulk run continues asynchronously.

member.summary: Submit acknowledgement contract for AdHoc batch-all requests. Keeps the HTTP layer explicit while the bulk run continues asynchronously.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.AdHocAllJobsUseCase
member.summary: AdHoc Batch - All Jobs use case. Fully extracted (no shared endpoint handler dependency).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.AdHocSingleJobUseCase
member.summary: AdHoc Batch - Single Job use case. Fully extracted (no shared endpoint handler dependency).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.CancelJobUseCase
member.summary: Cancel Job use case. Fully extracted (no shared endpoint handler dependency).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.CustomerChangeUseCase
member.summary: Customer Change use case. Fully extracted (no shared endpoint handler dependency).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.IAdHocAllJobsUseCase
member.summary: Use case for AdHoc Batch - All Jobs (durable schedule).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.IAdHocSingleJobUseCase
member.summary: Use case for AdHoc Batch - Single Job. Keeps Function adapters thin and improves ISP/DIP.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.ICancelJobUseCase
member.summary: Use case for Job Cancel (sync).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.ICustomerChangeUseCase
member.summary: Use case for Customer Change (sync).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.IPostJobUseCase
member.summary: Use case for Job Post (sync).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsUseCaseBase
member.summary: Shared helpers for JobOperations HTTP use cases. Keeps endpoint adapters/use cases SOLID while preserving existing behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.JobOperationsUseCaseBase.TryExtractCompanyAndSubProjectIdString(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Extract Company and SubProjectId from an FSCM WO payload JSON, logging failures but never throwing. This overload matches existing call-sites in Cancel/Post/AdHoc use cases.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.PostJobUseCase
member.summary: Post Job use case. Fully extracted (no shared endpoint handler dependency).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.Functions.WarmupReadUseCase
member.summary: Generic (no business IDs) warm-up endpoint to prime Dataverse + FSCM auth/TLS/DNS/HttpClient pipelines. Intentionally uses small GET/HEAD probes and avoids executing any business operations.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.WorkerExtensionStartupCodeExecutor.Configure(Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.IFunctionsWorkerApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the worker to register extension startup services.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionExecutorHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to enable registration of the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionExecutorHostBuilderExtensions.ConfigureGeneratedFunctionExecutor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures an optimized function executor to the invocation pipeline.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionExecutorAutoStartup
member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionExecutorAutoStartup.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.GeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider
member.summary: Custom implementation that returns function metadata definitions for the current worker.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.WorkerHostBuilderFunctionMetadataProviderExtension
member.summary: Extension methods to enable registration of the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.WorkerHostBuilderFunctionMetadataProviderExtension.ConfigureGeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the GeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider to the service collection. During initialization, the worker will return generated function metadata instead of relying on the Azure Functions host for function indexing.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionMetadataProviderAutoStartup
member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Functions.FunctionMetadataProviderAutoStartup.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the ValidationFailureRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ValidationFailureRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 3 values onto the backtracking stack.
